ūüöÄ TELEGRAM VOICE CHAT STREAMING SYSTEM

</div>---

ūüß† WHAT IS THIS?

This isn't just another Telegram music bot.

This is a high-performance voice chat streaming engine built for speed, stability, and power.

The BIHAR KE BAHUBALI Music Engine can stream music and video directly inside Telegram voice chats with low latency and high quality audio processing.

Powered by:

‚ÄĘ Python
‚ÄĘ Pyrogram
‚ÄĘ PyTgCalls
‚ÄĘ FFmpeg
‚ÄĘ MongoDB

---

ūüĒ• CORE CAPABILITIES

‚ö° Real-time music streaming in Telegram voice chats

ūüéß Ultra high-quality audio playback

ūüé¨ Video streaming support

ūüĆć Multi-platform music extraction

ūüďú Intelligent queue system

ūüĒĀ Automatic next-track playback

ūüĎĎ Admin command controls

ūüß† Optimized playback engine

ūüöÄ High stability architecture

---

‚öô SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS

Python 3.9+

FFmpeg

MongoDB Database

Telegram API Credentials

---

‚ö° INSTALLATION

Clone the repository

git clone https://github.com/Biharkebahubali/Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot.git

Move into directory

cd Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot

Install dependencies

pip install -U -r requirements.txt

---

ūüĒĎ CONFIGURATION

Rename the environment file

sample.env ‚Üí .env

Configure:

API_ID=your_api_id
API_HASH=your_api_hash
BOT_TOKEN=your_bot_token
OWNER_ID=your_telegram_id
LOGGER_ID=log_group_id
MONGO_URL=mongodb_url
SESSION=session_string

---

ūüöÄ START THE SYSTEM

bash start

Once started, the bot will begin streaming music inside Telegram voice chats.

---

ūüéõ COMMAND INTERFACE

Command| Action
/play| Stream music
/vplay| Stream video
/pause| Pause playback
/resume| Resume playback
/skip| Skip track
/stop| Stop playback
/queue| Show queue
